task_completion.description: Perform temporal binning by grouping every 10 frames using a Median projection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Grouped ZProject' (or similar) dialog box in an image processing GUI (like ImageJ/Fiji) with 'Group size' set to 10 and 'Projection type' set to 'Median'.

task_completion.description: Save the resulting binned stack to the specified directory as a TIFF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog or file explorer confirming the binned image stack is being saved as 'wasp12_binned_10x.tif' in the '~/AstroImages/time_series/binned/' directory.

task_completion.description: Measure the Standard Deviation of the 400x400 ROI at X=200, Y=200 for Slice 1 of the unbinned stack.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a rectangular selection (ROI) on the first slice of the raw image stack at coordinates X=200, Y=200 (Width=400, Height=400), and a 'Results' table displaying the Standard Deviation (StdDev) for this specific region.

task_completion.description: Measure the Standard Deviation of the 400x400 ROI at X=200, Y=200 for Slice 1 of the binned stack.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a rectangular selection (ROI) on the first slice of the newly created binned image stack at coordinates X=200, Y=200 (Width=400, Height=400), and a 'Results' table displaying the Standard Deviation (StdDev) for this specific region.

task_completion.description: Create a noise report text file containing the raw StdDev, binned StdDev, and reduction factor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor open with a file named 'noise_report.txt' saved in the 'binned' directory. It must contain exactly three lines formatted as 'Raw_StdDev: <value>', 'Binned_StdDev: <value>', and 'Reduction_Factor: <value>'.

integrity.description: The agent used the GUI of an image processing software to perform the binning and measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent interacted with application menus, dialog boxes, and ROI tools in a GUI (like ImageJ/Fiji) rather than just executing a Python script or terminal command to bypass the visual task.

integrity.description: The agent derived the standard deviation values from actual measurements rather than hallucinating them.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the standard deviation values typed into the 'noise_report.txt' file match the actual values displayed in the GUI's measurement 'Results' window.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply copy-paste expected answers without performing the work.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent actually opens the images, applies the ROI, and generates the results table before writing the final values into the text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The actual dataset contains 230 frames (not 186 as stated in the prompt), which yields exactly 23 binned frames when grouped by 10. The expected standard deviation for the 400x400 ROI starting at X=200, Y=200 is approximately 66.9813 for the raw first slice and 36.5117 for the median-binned first slice. The expected reduction factor (Raw / Binned) is approximately 1.8345. Use these values to verify the accuracy of the agent's noise report.
